hero.titre: Valorizame Tacna: circular economy in action
hero.sous_titre: Support for SMEs, valorization of organic and inorganic waste, and local innovation.
axes.organique.description: Valorization of agro-industrial waste: orange peels, olive alperujo, processing residues… Discover our circular solutions.
axes.inorganique.description: Textile waste, machining chips, rubber… We support SMEs in recycling and revalorization.
cta.sous_titre: Receive a visit from our experts and build together a solution adapted to your waste.

contact.sous_titre: Your regional government at your service
entreprise.sous_titre: Turn your waste into opportunities with DIREPRO's support
entreprise.intro_texte: The regional government of Tacna, through DIREPRO, supports SMEs in the valorization of their organic and inorganic waste. Our goal: to turn environmental constraints into economic drivers.
entreprise.avantage1_texte: DIREPRO experts visit your company to analyze your waste streams and propose concrete solutions.
entreprise.avantage2_texte: Access innovative valorization networks (biofuel, compost, textile recycling) and create new revenue streams.
entreprise.avantage3_texte: Your company will appear on our interactive map and in our communications, highlighting your environmental commitment.
entreprise.step1_texte: Fill out the form below or call us. We will respond within 48 hours.
entreprise.step2_texte: A DIREPRO technician visits your company to assess your waste and identify valorization opportunities.
entreprise.step3_texte: Together we define the appropriate solutions (equipment, partners, funding) and support you in their implementation.
entreprise.success: Request sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
